enriched_points.expanded_content: Rate constants serve as a crucial indicator of reaction speed, linking concentrations of reactants to reaction rates, essential for understanding catalytic efficiency.
Activation energy quantifies the energy barrier for reactions, influencing reaction rates; lower values indicate more efficient catalysts, enhancing overall reaction kinetics.

enriched_points.point_title: Effect of Catalysts on Reaction Rates
enriched_points.expanded_content: Catalysts significantly improve reaction rates by providing alternative pathways with lower activation energies, thereby increasing the frequency of effective collisions between reactants.
